title: Worktree badge component showing branch and dirty status
purpose: Displays a compact badge with worktree branch name and dirty indicator for git sessions, used in UI layouts.
module_context: Exports a React functional component WorktreeBadge that accepts session ID and CSS class name props, and uses a custom hook to determine worktree status.

steps.content: Retrieve the branch name, dirty flag, and session kind using the worktree status hook.
IF the session ID is null, branch is empty, or session kind is not git, return null.
ELSE render a span element containing the branch name in a code block.
IF the branch is dirty, append a visual indicator dot next to the branch name.
